metadata.title: MagoTalk - Blockchain & Finance
metadata.description: In-depth conversations on Web3, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, and the future of digital finance.
metadata.ogDescription: Explore Web3 through thoughtful interviews on blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, and more.

Home.heroDescription: Real conversations with builders, founders, and insiders in crypto, AI, and finance.
Home.filterHint: Choose one or more tags. Episodes matching any selected tag will be shown.

About.title: About
About.subtitle: In-depth conversations on crypto, AI, and finance—so you can see the landscape clearly.
About.aboutBody: MagoTalk is a Chinese-language interview and live-audio series on blockchain, DeFi, artificial intelligence, and related financial themes. We speak with builders, founders, and operators on the front lines—unpacking trends, mechanics, and debates without hype or jargon for its own sake.
About.missionBody:
Through rigorous, accessible dialogue, we lower the barrier to understanding and help you form your own framework faster.
We surface diverse perspectives—we do not make decisions for you.
About.teamIntro: The people behind programming, hosting, and delivery.
About.hostMagoBio: Founded MagoTalk; focuses on Web3 and digital-asset ecosystems.
About.hostKcBio: Shapes topics and live discussion, with a focus on markets and industry context.
About.hostStevenBio: Supports production and storytelling; bridges community and audience feedback.

Books.pageIntro: Download MAGO's books. Titles are provided in EPUB, PDF, or web-reading formats where available.
Books.formatHint: EPUB is best for e-readers and adjustable text. PDF preserves the original layout for previewing and downloading.

bookDescriptions.moneyCode: Money Code is MAGO's guide to understanding money, work, leverage, and personal decision-making in a world reshaped by AI and digital networks.
bookDescriptions.aiIsEatingTheWorld: AI is eating the world examines how cheap intelligence reorganizes work, wealth, companies, finance, trust, and world order.
